JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.social.linguistics

Uses of Package
org.jscience.social.linguistics

Packages that use org.jscience.social.linguistics
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders
User interface components and internationalization support for JScience applications.
org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
org.jscience.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.jscience.social.ui.viewers.linguistics
User interface components and internationalization support for JScience applications.
  • Classes in org.jscience.social.linguistics used by org.jscience.social.linguistics
    Class
    Description
    ChatSituation
    Represents the interaction of participants communicating.
    Corpus
     
    DialectMapper.DialectDataPoint
    Data point from a linguistic survey at a specific geographical location.
    DialectMapper.Isogloss
    Represents a line on a map marking the geographical boundary of a linguistic feature.
    DialectMapper.LinguisticFeature
    Represents a specific linguistic variable (phonological, lexical, etc.).
    EtymologyGraph.EtymologyNode
     
    Grammar
    Represents the grammar rules for parsing a language.
    GrammarChecker.Error
     
    Grapheme
    Represents a grapheme - the minimal unit of written language.
    Language
    Represents a human language as a systematic linguistic entity.
    LanguageDetector.DetectionResult
     
    Lexeme
    Represents a lexemeâ€”an abstract unit of the lexicon in a language that encompasses all inflected forms of a single word.
    LinguisticData.SentimentPoint
     
    LinguisticData.SyntaxNode
     
    LinguisticsConstants.AnalysisLevel
    Levels of linguistic analysis.
    LinguisticsConstants.ArticulationManner
    Manner of articulation.
    LinguisticsConstants.ArticulationPlace
    Place of articulation.
    LinguisticsConstants.Kineme
    Kinesics (non-verbal communication).
    LinguisticsConstants.LanguageFamily
    Major language families.
    LinguisticsConstants.PragmaticMaxim
    Grice's Maxims of Pragmatics.
    LinguisticsConstants.SentenceType
    Sentence types.
    LinguisticsConstants.SpeechAct
    Austin's Speech Acts.
    LinguisticsConstants.WritingSystem
    Writing systems.
    LinguisticsModel.SentimentPoint
     
    LinguisticsModel.SyntaxNode
     
    LinguisticSystem.CorpusProfile
    Conducts a full statistical profile of a corpus.
    LinguisticSystem.TextMetricsBinary
    Analyzes the readability and complexity of a text.
    Locutor
    Represents an individual participant in a linguistic interaction.
    MetricScanner.MetricalAnalysis
     
    MetricScanner.MetricalFoot
     
    MetricScanner.RhymeAnalysis
     
    Morpheme
    Represents a morphemeâ€”the smallest irreducible unit of meaning or grammatical function within a language.
    Morpheme.Type
    Functional and structural classification of morphemes.
    MorphologicalAnalyzer.Morpheme
     
    MorphologicalAnalyzer.MorphemeType
     
    MorphologicalAnalyzer.MorphologicalAnalysis
     
    NamedEntityRecognizer.Entity
     
    NaturalLanguageAnalyzer
    Universal analyzer for Natural Languages.
    Phoneme
    Represents a phoneme - the minimal unit of sound in a language.
    Phoneme.Type
    Type of phoneme.
    PhoneticTranscriber.Language
     
    Phrase
    Represents a phraseâ€”a group of words that function together as a single syntactic unit within a sentence but do not necessarily contain a subject and a predicate (clause). * @version 2.0
    Phrase.Type
    Functional categories of phrases based on their head word.
    POS
    Standard Part Of Speech (POS) tags for natural and formal languages.
    ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    Encapsulates the evaluation of a readability calculation.
    Rule
    The Rule class defines a rule used by a grammar to parse a language.
    Sentence
    Represents a sentence, a sequence of phrases or words that expresses a complete thought or proposition.
    Sentence.Purpose
    Communicative intent (illocutionary force) of the sentence.
    Sentence.Structure
    Complexity categories for sentence structure.
    SentimentAnalyzer.Sentiment
    Qualitative classification of text sentiment.
    SentimentAnalyzer.SentimentResult
    Result of a sentiment analysis operation.
    SentimentToneAnalyzer.SentimentScore
     
    SyntacticComplexity.ComplexityMetrics
     
    SyntaxTreeParser.Node
     
    Text
    Represents a document or textual passage, composed of a sequence of sentences.
    VerbalCommunication
    Represents a single act of verbal communication between locutors.
    Word
    Represents a linguistic word, defined as a sequence of one or more morphemes that form a minimal meaningful unit of language. * @version 2.0
    Word.PartOfSpeech
    Standard parts of speech (POS) categories.
    WordAnalysis
    Stores morphological and semantic analysis of a word.
